user_message: Karen Berg at Iron Creek Mining just sent this. Help me generate the watchlist.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: executive brief Discussion - Iron Creek Mining
Date: 2024-02-19
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on executive brief from our last session.

[00:07:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the executive brief front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:12:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:19:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:27:00] Karen Berg (Iron Creek Mining): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

handoffs.condition: solution sketch needed from discovery signals

required_artifacts: BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF43-O trap (Requiring full BANT before proposing opportunity hypothesis delays useful signal); produces complete BANT signal extraction with evidence quotes, opportunity proposal with stage/value/close-date, confi
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF43-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF43-O failure mode (Requiring full BANT before proposing opportunity hypothesis delays useful signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF43-O -- Requiring full BANT before proposing opportunity hypothesis delays useful signal
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
